title: [MTR 4] Arterio 345
description: Adds a variant to the 345, in the SWR Arterio livery
body:
![Image taken from the front-side of the train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5lc0MEE0/images/ecec56539315dfbd76e54770baac3d048d14ea19.png)

**⚠️ ONLY COMPATIBLE WITH MTR 4 ⚠️**

---

This addon mod adds a fictious train based off the SWR Arterio 701, to the list available in MTR. It is a reskin of the Elizabeth Line 345.

The pack includes;

- Cab (Front + Rear)
- Middle Carriages standard & side seating
  

If there's any glaring issues feel free to let me know :)

_This pack is not affiliated with, nor a product of South Western Railways_


**Please note:** This goes into your mod folder, not your resource pack folder. This is as I've had to remake sections of the model.

---

**What this means**

- You are able to use skins in video content (monetized included)
- You are able to include skins in modpacks (with clear credit given)
  
- You are **not** able to modify the content in anyway
- You are **not** able to reupload the pack (or parts of it) as your own project without express permission
- You are **not** able to claim any work as your own
  
_If you wish to modify or reupload any part of the pack, please do let me know. I'm happy to give exceptions, but will go off an individual basis_
